exam_name: CILS B1 Cittadinanza (Italian Citizenship Italian Language Certificate)
exam_price_notes: Approx. €75–€95 (~$83–$105 USD); fee varies by exam centre

testing_centers.provider: Università per Stranieri di Perugia — CELI Authorised Centres (worldwide)
Università per Stranieri di Siena — CILS Authorised Centres (worldwide)

id_requirements: Valid government-issued photo ID (passport, national identity card, or equivalent) required at the exam centre.
exam_rules: No electronic devices or reference materials permitted. Oral exams conducted in person with a trained examiner. Listening tasks are played via audio recording; earphones not provided.
renewal_options: CELI and CILS certificates have lifetime validity — they do not expire.

prerequisites.description: Non-EU foreign nationals applying for Italian citizenship (naturalisation) under Article 9 of Law 91/1992. B1 Italian language level required by Italian law for citizenship applications.

retake_policy.notes: No official waiting period. Candidates may re-sit at the next available exam session (exams held 2–4 times per year depending on centre and level).

domains.name: Comprensione della Lettura — Reading (civic documents, public notices, rights and duties)
Produzione Scritta — Writing (formal letters to authorities, civic communications)
Comprensione dell'Ascolto — Listening (civic information broadcasts, official announcements)
Produzione Orale — Speaking (interact with public offices, describe civic situations)

official_study_resources.title: CELI Esempi di Prove d'Esame (Official Sample Papers)
CILS Materiali di Preparazione (Official Sample Papers)

aliases: cils b1 cittadinanza italian citizenship italian language certificate
